description: Displays expandable content sections using native HTML details and summary elements. Works without JavaScript and is accessible by default.

open.agent_hint: Use open to keep accordion expanded by default.

do: Use summary as the accordion trigger
Use open to expand by default
Use native details element for accessibility
dont: Do not replace details with div
Do not use JavaScript for open state

examples.label: Default accordion
examples.emmet: details>summary{What is ignix-lite?}+p{Lightweight semantic UI library}

examples.label: Open by default
examples.emmet: details[open]>summary{How does this work?}+p{Uses native browser behavior}
examples.html:
How does this work?

Uses native browser behavior

examples.label: FAQ item
examples.emmet: details>summary{Does it require JS?}+p{No, it works without JavaScript}
examples.html:
Does it require JS?

No, it works without JavaScript
